text: As I stand before this display, the sharp geometry and cool glass partitions seem to cordon me off from the bustle outside, sharpening my awareness of the present moment. The bold 'R+D' lettering hints at exploration and curiosity, inspiring a sense of anticipation within me. Yet, the text nearby stirs introspection—am I a mere observer, or part of a larger experiment? I am both seen and unseen here: part of the exhibition and yet just a visitor, my presence fleeting but meaningful. The atmosphere is a blend of quiet intrigue and slight unease, as though these walls invite both participation and contemplation.
